response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 15+ years of software engineering across diverse platforms and current involvement in AI-agent infrastructure. However, the candidate lacks the strategic advisory experience with enterprise customers, formal AI/ML education (Master's/PhD), and demonstrated expertise building AI-powered products that are central to a Director-level principal engineer role focused on AI strategy. Current trajectory is promising but insufficient evidence of the strategic leadership and recognized AI expertise required.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering with Staff-level positions across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, demonstrating sustained technical leadership capability
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing active engagement with cutting-edge AI infrastructure technologies
Proven entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective (ongoing) and work at multiple startups, demonstrating ability to identify and build platforms from the ground up
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; lacks formal machine learning or AI research education preferred for the role
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners on cloud and AI technology adoption, a core responsibility of the position
Resume shows frequent job transitions (most roles 1-3 years) and overlapping positions, suggesting tactical engagement rather than sustained strategic leadership trajectory
